assessment_items.question_content:
**The impulse for the Vietnam Veterans Memorial was based on the idea of a physical cut into the earth symbolically suggesting a wound that must heal.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/847043f50f7eabb0cd190e1b3e182561.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**The impulse for the Vietnam Veterans Memorial was indeed based on the idea of a physical cut into the earth symbolically suggesting a wound that must heal.**

**[Watch this video to review](/test-prep/ap-art-history/global-contemporary/v/MayaLin-VietnamVetMem)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is NOT true of the Vietnam Veterans Memorial?**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/847043f50f7eabb0cd190e1b3e182561.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Lin's polished granite memorial looks two walls sunken into the earth and is inscribed with over 58,000 names of service people killed during the Vietnam War.**

**[Watch this video to review](/test-prep/ap-art-history/global-contemporary/v/MayaLin-VietnamVetMem)**

choices.content: Maya Lin won the commission through the anonymous selection of her design.
Maya Lin was criticized for her use of abstraction.
The scale of the monument and the density of the names serves as an overwhelming reminder of the impact of war.
Lin's polished marble memorial looks like two intersecting walls standing on top of a hill and is inscribed with the  names of 58,000 service people killed during the Vietnam War.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Lin's monument relies on the conventions of war memorials by employing figurative representations, heroicism, and allegory.**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/847043f50f7eabb0cd190e1b3e182561.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Lin's monument strips away the representational form of traditional monuments that relied on herocism and allegory.**  

**[Watch this video to review](/test-prep/ap-art-history/global-contemporary/v/MayaLin-VietnamVetMem)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Maya Lin used black polished granite and [[☃ dropdown 1]] reflection in her memorial, creating another dimension to this work of art.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/847043f50f7eabb0cd190e1b3e182561.jpg)
hints:
**Maya Lin used the viewer's reflection in her memorial, creating another dimension to this work of art.**

**[Watch this video to review](/test-prep/ap-art-history/global-contemporary/v/MayaLin-VietnamVetMem)**
